prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of AON stock, I used typical short-term volatility patterns for large-cap financial services stocks. AON typically exhibits daily volatility around 1-2%. The point estimate remains at the current price assuming random walk behavior. Confidence intervals expand based on estimated daily standard deviation of approximately 1.2%, scaled for 2 days using square root of time rule, then adjusted for 50% (±0.67σ), 80% (±1.28σ), and 90% (±1.64σ) confidence levels.
